violations.text: The side door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The dipper well faucets were observed positioned hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Closing hinge or mechanism is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2025
The floor and wall junctures in the backroom area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The walls and ceiling in the main kitchen area were observed to be in need of covering of some exposed wood (near window and ceiling vent). The physical facilities must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
